channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: Khumalo, Tshuma families at odds over funeral arrangements for UK triple murder victims @nehandaradio
item.description: The family of slain UK-based Zimbabwean mother Nothabo Khumalo has reportedly rejected efforts by Ndodana Tshuma’s relatives to coordinate funeral arrangements, exposing deep divisions after the triple murder. The post Khumalo, Tshuma families at odds over funeral arrangements for UK triple murder victims appeared first on Nehanda Radio. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Nehanda Radio

item.title: Zimbabwean hip-hop artist Holy Ten arrested over alleged rape of 14-year-old girl @nehandaradio
item.description: Zimbabwean rapper Holy Ten has been arrested over allegations of raping a 14-year-old girl, with police saying investigations are ongoing. The post Zimbabwean hip-hop artist Holy Ten arrested over alleged rape of 14-year-old girl appeared first on Nehanda Radio. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Nehanda Radio

item.title: Zimbabwe adds freight rail option to lithium export gateway
item.description: Reuters Zimbabwe’s state-owned railway company said on Tuesday its collaboration with private operators now provides capacity to haul lithium concentrate to Maputo port in Mozambique by rail, expanding logistics options for the battery mineral. Africa’s top lithium producer Zimbabwe mostly trucks the bulk mineral to port, a more expensive option fraught with logistical bottlenecks. The [...] The post Zimbabwe adds freight rail option to lithium export gateway appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Zimbabwe secures duty-free access to China for selected exports until 2028
item.description: Selected Zimbabwean products can now enter China duty-free under a two-year Unilateral Zero-Tariff Preferential Market Access arrangement. Speaking at a post-cabinet briefing, Tuesday, Foreign Affairs Minister Amon Murwira outlined Zimbabwe’s participation in the initiative unveiled by China during the 2024 Forum on China–Africa Cooperation (FOCAC). China introduced the unilateral zero-tariff preferential market access programme to expand [...] The post Zimbabwe secures duty-free access to China for selected exports until 2028 appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Zimbabwe temporarily closes Victoria Falls rainforest over wandering elephant
item.description: Xinhua Zimbabwe has temporarily restricted access to its prime tourist destination, the Victoria Falls Rainforest, following reports of a wandering elephant in the area, the Zimbabwe Parks and Wildlife Management Authority (ZimParks) said Tuesday. “The restriction was instituted as a precautionary measure to safeguard visitors, staff and wildlife while minimizing the risk of human-wildlife conflict. [...] The post Zimbabwe temporarily closes Victoria Falls rainforest over wandering elephant appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Freda Rebecca becomes Zimbabwe’s first gold mine with internationally accredited on-site laboratory
item.description: MUTAPA Gold Resources’ Freda Rebecca Mine has become the first gold mining operation in Zimbabwe to establish an internationally accredited on-site laboratory aimed at improving the accuracy of mineral analysis and cutting exploration costs. The accreditation, which is valid until 15 March 2031, recognises the laboratory’s competence in chemical analysis, a critical process used to [...] The post Freda Rebecca becomes Zimbabwe’s first gold mine with internationally accredited on-site laboratory appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Mutapa Gold invests US$1.2 million in Zimbabwe’s first accredited gold mine laboratory
item.description: MUTAPA Gold Resources’ Freda Rebecca Mine has become the first gold mining operation in Zimbabwe to establish an internationally accredited on-site laboratory aimed at improving the accuracy of mineral analysis and cutting exploration costs. The accreditation, which is valid until 15 March 2031, recognises the laboratory’s competence in chemical analysis, a critical process used to [...] The post Mutapa Gold invests US$1.2 million in Zimbabwe’s first accredited gold mine laboratory appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Zimbabwe, Namibia deepen labour ties
item.description: Mkhululi Ncube Bulawayo Bureau ZIMBABWE and Namibia have stepped up efforts to strengthen workplace safety and labour inspection systems through enhanced bilateral cooperation, with officials from the two countries meeting... (via Ebusiness Weekly) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Ebusiness Weekly

item.title: Government disowns Zharare @bulawayo24
item.description: Wooes continue to mount for former Citizens Against Economic Sanctions Zimbabwe director Martin Zharare after several Government ministries and agencies publicly distanced themselves from him in the w... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Why Everyone Suddenly Hates Messi: A propaganda Breakdown
item.description: In December 2022, the whole planet celebrated Messi lifting the World Cup. This summer, everyone is calling him a cheat and a villain (well, mostly people who never watch football and teenagers). I’ve watched football my whole life (so this is a sensitive topic to me), and I shape narratives for a living. Marketing, positioning, [...] The post Why Everyone Suddenly Hates Messi: A propaganda Breakdown appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: Holy Ten arrested after girl, 14, accuses him of rape

item.title: GameZone SpinPlus: Spin Into Action with Games Worth Exploring @zimsituation
item.description: Whether you’re completely new to online slots or simply looking for another platform to explore, GameZone SpinPlus is likely to appear on your radar. It has become one of the standout gaming sections within the GameZone ecosystem, bringing together a growing collection of slot-style games that players can enjoy from their desktop or mobile devices. [...] The post GameZone SpinPlus: Spin Into Action with Games Worth Exploring appeared first on Zimbabwe Situation. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: CHEAPEST FLIGHTS: Nearly 1500 passengers buy tickets for Air Zimbabwe’s new Harare London route
item.description: Harare – After a hiatus spanning more than 14 years, Air Zimbabwe is poised to re-establish direct flight connections between Harare and London, a development that has already seen nearly 1,500 passengers secure bookings for the eagerly anticipated route. This significant milestone, heralded by government officials as a new dawn for the national carrier, promises [...] The post CHEAPEST FLIGHTS: Nearly 1500 passengers buy tickets for Air Zimbabwe’s new Harare London route first appeared on My Zimbabwe News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: Angry Harare man stabs 7-months pregnant wife, burns their 2 children to death... naked wife flees to neighbour’s house
item.description: THE ASHES OF INNOCENCE: Inside the Horrific Harare Cabin Fire and the Scourge of Family Arson HARARE – The early morning silence of Eastview Phase 10, a burgeoning suburb on the eastern edge of Harare, was shattered this past Sunday by screams that will haunt the community for generations. What began as a domestic dispute [...] The post Angry Harare man stabs 7-months pregnant wife, burns their 2 children to death... naked wife flees to neighbour’s house first appeared on My Zimbabwe News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: HD & Blackways and Culture K Join Exciting UK Mbira Festival 2026 Line-up
item.description: The countdown to the UK Mbira Festival 2026 has begun, with organisers confirming that HD & Blackways Band and Culture K have officially joined an already impressive line-up of artists for one of the United Kingdom’s biggest celebrations of Zimbabwean culture and heritage. The festival will take place on Saturday, 5 September 2026, at the [...] The post HD & Blackways and Culture K Join Exciting UK Mbira Festival 2026 Line-up appeared first on ZIMBUZZ. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbuzz
